% INSR Scientific Publishing Platform v4.0 configuration.
% Switch output here; do not edit main.tex for document-type changes.
\INSRConfigure{
  document/type = position-paper,
  document/density = standard,
  document/build-profile = development,
  design/theme = editorial,
  design/palette = neuroclinical,
  design/font = libertinus,
  design/mode = light,
  accessibility/high-contrast = false,
  localization/language = english,
  localization/direction = ltr,
  metadata/title = {Integrative Neuro-Somatic Recalibration Position Paper},
  metadata/subtitle = {Conceptual framework and research roadmap},
  metadata/short-title = {INSR Position Paper},
  metadata/date = {14 July 2026},
  metadata/author = {INSR Research Team},
  metadata/institution = {INSR Research Consortium},
  metadata/keywords = {INSR, position paper, trauma research, neuro-somatic calibration},
  bibliography/resource = {},
  content/template = auto
}


\INSRAddInstitution{
  id = insr-consortium,
  name = {INSR Research Consortium},
  short-name = {INSR},
  type = {research-consortium}
}
\INSRAddAuthor{
  id = insr-research-team,
  name = {INSR Research Team},
  short-name = {INSR Team},
  orcid = {0000-0000-0000-0000},
  affiliations = {insr-consortium},
  roles = {conceptualization,methodology,software,writing-original-draft}
}
